tools.name: currencies.currenciesHistoryGet
tools.description:
Historical OHLC data for the specified period and interval size

The combination of the interval parameter and start and end dates can result in results
being truncated to conform to result size limits. See comments on interval parameter for details on valid interval values.

tools.name: currencies.currenciesSummaryGet
tools.description: Current and daily summary information combined into a single quote

tools.name: currencies.currenciesSupportedCurrenciesHistoryGet
tools.description:
Only the currency pairs in the direction noted can be used with the history endpoint.
For example: USD/CAD is not the same as CAD/USD

tools.name: currencies.currenciesSupportedCurrenciesRateGet
tools.description:
Any of the currencies in this list can be paired with any other currency in this list when supplied to the Rate endpoint.
For example: USD/CAD,CAD/USD,USD/EUR,EUR/CAD

tools.name: currencies.currenciesSupportedCurrenciesSummaryGet
tools.description:
Only the currency pairs in the direction noted can be used with the Summary endpoint.
For example: USD/CAD is not the same as CAD/USD

tools.name: metals.metalsBenchmarkHistoryGet
tools.description:
Historical OHLC data for the specified period and interval size

The combination of the interval parameter and start and end dates can result in results
being truncated to conform to result size limits. See comments on interval parameter for details on valid interval values.

The historicalfx flag is used to determine whether to apply today's fx rates to a historical period, or to apply the historical rates from that same time frame.

tools.name: metals.metalsSpotHistoryGet
tools.description:
Historical OHLC data for the specified period and interval size

The combination of the interval parameter and start and end dates can result in results
being truncated to conform to result size limits. See comments on interval parameter for details on valid interval values.

The historicalfx flag is used to determine whether to apply today's fx rates to a historical period, or to apply the historical rates from that same time frame.

tools.name: metals.metalsSpotRatioHistoryGet
tools.description:
Historical data for the specified period and interval size

The combination of the interval parameter and start and end dates can result in results
being truncated to conform to result size limits. See comments on interval parameter for details on valid interval values.

tools.name: metals.metalsSpotRatioSummaryGet
tools.description: Ratios between prices of two metals

tools.name: metals.metalsSpotSummaryGet
tools.description: Current and daily summary information combined into a single quote

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
